---
title: "Alexander Ross"
subtitle: "Political Scientist"
image: images/headshot.jpeg
toc: false
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:alexander-frederick.ross.1@ulaval.ca
    - icon: file-earmark-text
      text: CV
      href: cv.qmd
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=n7m5UVcAAAAJ&hl=en
---

:::{#hero-heading}

I am a postdoctoral researcher at Université Laval. I received my PhD in Political Science from UC Riverside in 2024.

My research interests include **personal debt**, **political behavior**, and **American politics**.

:::

## Research Interests

- Personal debt
- Political behavior
- American politics

## Education

**PhD in Political Science** | University of California, Riverside | 2024

**Master of Public Policy** | University of California, Riverside | 2017

**BA in Political Science** | University of California, Riverside | 2013

## News

*Check back for updates on recent publications, conference presentations, and other academic news.*
